S05.meta: // SLIDE 05 — QUESTIONS BEFORE CODE: FIVE QU

data.title: QUESTIONS BEFORE CODE: FIVE QUESTIONS, NO CHANGES
blocks: · "What is the file structure of this project? List the directories and files at the top two levels, and tell me what you
· "What styling approach does this project use? What CSS conventions do you see, and what would you assume if I asked you
· "If I asked you to add a 'Contact' page to this site, what files would you create or modify? Do not make any changes yet
"Are there any patterns in this project that look inconsistent places where similar things are done differently in different files?"
· "What is the one thing about this project that, if I do not tell you about it explicitly, you would probably get wrong o

data.title: CLASSROOM ACTIVITY: STUDENTS RUN THEIR FIRST SESSION
blocks: · Run /init. Read the generated CLAUDE.md. Note one thing Claude saw that they would not have written down themselves.
· Ask three questions about the codebase. Document Claude's answers.
Make no changes in this first session. Submit a one-paragraph reflection what surprised them about Claude's reading of the project?

data.title: COMMON MISCONCEPTIONS
blocks: "Claude Code is just a better Claude.ai."
"I'll skip questions-before-code; I know what I want."
"Installation problems mean this book isn't for me."
"Plan mode is overhead."
"The context window is a developer concern; I'll just keep typing."
